# Chicago-Kare (retro-kare-chicago-font)

**Upstream:** https://github.com/KingDuane/Chicago-Kare
**License:** MIT — see LICENSE

## What it looks like
Faithful reproduction of Susan Kare's Chicago typeface (Apple Macintosh 1984 system font).
Bitmap-origin but packaged as scalable font files. All-caps and lowercase Latin, numerals,
basic punctuation. The typeface that shipped on System 1-7 Mac chrome.

## What it offers
- TTF/OTF font files
- README with usage
- Reproduction notes

## Clawmachine fit
PRIMARY. This is THE Kare font for authentic Mac-OS-era typography. Use with system.css
as its advertised font stack or for any chrome title/button label that should read as
"classic macintosh". system.css already bundles Chicago-12.woff but that's a pixel bitmap
variant — KingDuane/Chicago-Kare is the scalable version for larger sizes.
